subject: Add profile for building root
commit_message:
Add profile for building root

Signed-off-by: Denes Nemeth <denes.nemeth@nokia.com>

Patch Set 5:

So, I did some tests in the sandbox and noticed the jobs that you are using have a little bug that I need to fix first. These jobs basically should be taking the "files" variable you are using in line 19. This variable, we need to set it to "files: 'pom.xml'" If you want these jobs to be triggered by changes in pom.xml only. The issue is that this job is hardcoded to pick all file by default. 

Let me do this correction in the templates first and link you to that change. Then after, I can correct yours.

Give me 2 mins..

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/40393/ this is the change we need first.. let me now adapt yours

Just made few more changes you need. 
We do not need to specify "pom: pom.xml" since the job takes by default pom.xml already if left blank. 

The files have been changed to "files: 'pom.xml'" to make these jobs trigger just by cahnges on the pom.xml... 

Is this what you needed?

Patch Set 9:

Oh... that one.. 
So that one is part of the post build actions. This command is just for deploying the logs of the jenkins job itself and this command is just standard for all jobs. 

You need to look into the build steps rather. 
The verify job runs the install with the profile action 
The merge job is the one that runs the deploy with the profile action too. 

This logs post build action runs after the actual build (with your profile) succeeds or fails.

Patch Set 9:

I see, so this one does not deploy to nexus. The only side effect of not having the profile there that it will perform the full build of all modules. (This should not cause any harm, maybe it will be not too optimal. 
 I will need to get this merged to see what happens https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/40195/

Patch Set 9:

The code to be able to test the build was merged, however there are multiple problems with the build:
1. When the code was merged this was not triggered https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-merge-profile-java/
2. The vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm-1.1.0.pom is present in the staging repo https://nexus.onap.org/service/local/repo_groups/staging/content/org/onap/vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm/vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm/1.1.0/vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm-1.1.0.pom however it is not present in the snapshot repo 
3. From this job https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily/ maven is executed 2 times without the profile if you search for mvn in the job config it is easy to find those two places.

Thanks for the help

Patch Set 9:

Dear Denes, 

here is my reply to your questions:

1. When the code was merged this was not triggered https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-merge-profile-java/

--- The reason why the job didn't got triggered was becuase at the same time, we were experiencing some gerrit trigger issues in Jenkins for which we had to restart Jenkins. I just commented "remerge" in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/40195/2 and the job started now. 

2. The vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm-1.1.0.pom is present in the staging repo https://nexus.onap.org/service/local/repo_groups/staging/content/org/onap/vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm/vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm/1.1.0/vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm-1.1.0.pom however it is not present in the snapshot repo

--- The issue was with the merge job that was not producing it since it was not running in your previous point. Once ran, here is the snapshot: https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/snapshots/org/onap/vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm/vfc-nfvo-driver-vnfm-svnfm/

3. From this job https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily/ maven is executed 2 times without the profile if you search for mvn in the job config it is easy to find those two places.

--- Are you referring to these:
   - versions:set versions:update-child-modules versions:commit -B
     This call is just to set the versions using versions.properties.
     It does not need a specific profile since is a standard call
     to set the versioning
   - clean deploy -P rootOnly -B -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=warn
     This one uses the profile. Here is the log of how it looks like:

11:58:00 [vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily] $ /w/tools/hudson.tasks.Maven_MavenInstallation/mvn33/bin/mvn -s /tmp/settings9029177147940518854.xml -gs /tmp/global-settings5032500055046127735.xml -DGERRIT_BRANCH=master -DPROJECT=vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm -DMVN=/w/tools/hudson.tasks.Maven_MavenInstallation/mvn33/bin/mvn -DGERRIT_REFSPEC=refs/heads/master "-DARCHIVE_ARTIFACTS= **/target/surefire-reports/*-output.txt" -DGERRIT_PROJECT=vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm -DSTACK_NAME=$JOB_NAME-$BUILD_NUMBER -DNone= clean deploy -P rootOnly -B -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=warn

Patch Set 9:

Dear Jess

1. I added a new dummy to the same repo I will try to get it merged and see if that one will trigger the merge job.
2. If you look at the logs of this https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily/7/consoleFull when it is executing the 
11:56:29 [vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily] $ /w/tools/hudson.tasks.Maven_MavenInstallation/mvn33/bin/mvn -s /tmp/settings3966990673691477317.xml -gs /tmp/global-settings155457086708483627.xml -DGERRIT_BRANCH=master -DPROJECT=vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm -DMVN=/w/tools/hudson.tasks.Maven_MavenInstallation/mvn33/bin/mvn -DGERRIT_REFSPEC=refs/heads/master "-DARCHIVE_ARTIFACTS= **/target/surefire-reports/*-output.txt" -DGERRIT_PROJECT=vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm -DSTACK_NAME=$JOB_NAME-$BUILD_NUMBER -DnewVersion=1.1.0 versions:set versions:update-child-modules versions:commit -B

It will trigger the "build" of all modules (since the profile is not specified)
11:56:53 [INFO] Reactor Build Order:

11:56:53 [INFO] vfc/nfvo/drivers/vnfm/svnfm/huawei/vn....

The profile setting would also be required here. Is this possible?

Thanks Denes

I don't think so, since other jobs that use the profile option do not run "versions:set versions:update-child-modules versions:commit -B" using the specific profile. 

I can run a test with the profile set just to see if the result binaries we get are different. 

I have triggered here: 
https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-svnfm-root-master-release-version-profile-java-daily/
